full_text:
Xi Zhicai 戲志才
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xi Zhicai (戲志才)was born in Yingchuan commandery. Recommended by Xun Yu, Xi Zhicai became a valuable officer to Cao Cao. Xi Zhicai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
